allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Sleep 6; Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 Id,ProcessName,MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 8; $p = Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { $p | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle } | Select-Object Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "Electron processes running: $\($p.Count\)" } else { Write-Output "No electron process found" })
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process ChronosGrid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle } | Select-Object Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process ChronosGrid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle } | Select-Object Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize; $c = \(Get-Process ChronosGrid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; Write-Output "process count: $c"')
Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./serviceAccount.json'\); console.log\('project_id:', s.project_id\); console.log\('client_email:', s.client_email\);")
